title: CobbleLemon Systems
description: A collective mod for all exclusive CobbleLemon server features.
body:
CobbleLemon is a Fabric mod for Cobblemon servers that combines several server-focused gameplay and management systems into one mod.

It adds a trainer hub, an in-game guide, gym league menus, ZA Royale battle tools, shop request handling with Waystones support, guilds, command token items, and breeding control features. These systems are designed to give Cobblemon servers more structured progression, player navigation, community features, and admin-managed rewards without needing several separate CobbleLemon addon jars.

Players can use commands such as /hub, /guide, /gym, /za, /requestshop, and /guild to open the mod's main menus and interact with server features. Server staff can configure the included systems through the generated config files and use command tokens or module-specific commands to manage rewards, leagues, events, guilds, and shop requests.

Download this if you run a Cobblemon Fabric server and want a unified set of tools for player hubs, guides, leagues, guilds, requests, event battles, and controlled breeding behavior.

Important information before downloading:

- Requires Minecraft 1.21.1, Fabric Loader, Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, Cobblemon, Waystones, and Cobblemon Raid Dens.
- Install the mod on the server and on players' clients so the menus, packets, items, and screens work correctly.
- This unified mod replaces the older separate CobbleLemon jars. Do not run it together with the old commandtokens, cobblelemon_hub, cobblelemon_guide, cobblelemon_gym_league, zaroyale, shoprequestwaystones, cobblelemon_guilds, or disablebreeding jars.
- LuckPerms is recommended for permission-based server setups.
- Optional integrations include Open Parties and Claims, Cobbledollars, Styled Chat, Placeholder API, Styled Nicknames, Cobbreeding, Unchained, Exposure, and CasinoRocket.
